# technitium_dhcp_leases (Data Source)

Lists current DHCP leases (dynamic and reserved), optionally filtered by scope. Returns an empty list when no leases match.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "technitium_dhcp_leases" "lan" {
  scope = "lan"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `scope` (String) Only return leases belonging to this scope.

### Read-Only

- `leases` (Attributes List) Current leases. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--leases))

<a id="nestedatt--leases"></a>
### Nested Schema for `leases`

Read-Only:

- `address` (String)
- `client_identifier` (String)
- `hardware_address` (String)
- `host_name` (String)
- `lease_expires` (String)
- `lease_obtained` (String)
- `scope` (String)
- `type` (String) Dynamic or Reserved.
